issues.title: Multiple lockfiles detected
issues.message: Multiple package manager lockfiles were found. This can cause dependency installs to differ between local machines and CI.

issues.title: Missing .env.example
issues.message: This project uses a .env file but does not provide a .env.example file to document required environment variables.

issues.title: Missing Reanimated Babel plugin
issues.message: react-native-reanimated usually requires the Babel plugin react-native-reanimated/plugin so React Native and Reanimated setup works correctly.

issues.title: Missing iOS bundle identifier
issues.message: expo.ios.bundleIdentifier is missing or empty. This field is important for iOS release and build identity.

issues.title: Missing Android package name
issues.message: expo.android.package is missing or empty. This field is important for Android release and build identity.

issues.title: Missing EAS production build profile
issues.message: build.production is important for release readiness and keeping CI and release builds consistent.
